commentary_text: Gone straight away!Shami pitches this full, outside off. Rahul goes for an extravagant inside-out cover drive, but mistimes it straight to deep point
And now Shami angles it in. Back of a length, moves back in to hit Rana on the pads, who misses a flick
Shami is keeping it wide for some reason. Swings away after pitching, but Rana happy to see the ball drift far away from him
Shami bangs this in full and right on the wide marker. A big whoosh from Rana as he plays at it, but plays at air. In fact, the umpire's signaled a wide
Bowls it fuller now, angles into Rana once more from outside off. Confident defensive drive down to mid-off

Rana finally makes use of the width Shami keeps offering up. Barely any swing or venom on this one. Rana anticipates it, and slashes at it well away from his body. Rushes down to the deep point boundary
A great bouncer, this!Pitches outside off and rises at the batter as it moves right into his helmet. Ducks out of the way at the last moment
On a great length, on the stumps too. Swings away from the batter and Rana shoulders arms
On a good length, just outside off. Driven from deep into the crease and towards deep point, who collects right where he stands
Great bowling!A tad of swing, but it's just the bounce off a good length at 140 clicks. Rises into Rana's hips and thuds in there
Prince is keeping his lines really tight. Good length, on the stumps, Rana can only bring his bat down the defend it to cover
On the stumps once more but it's too short. Rises at Rana's chest and he swivels on his feet to hit across the line, into the deep square boundary
Prince goes fuller again. But too straight on the pads, there to be hit. Goes for the flick but misses, sees the ball go to Pant
He corrects his line to right on the pads. Rana goes on the front foot to flick it towards mid-wicket and take off for a well-judged run
Prince drifts definitely down leg now. No shot batter reaches that. Umpire spreads his arms, time to reload
Banged in short, drifts past Pant. Not short enough to be called wide, so turns out to be a good defensive delivery
Goes wide again. Angled away from the batter, and springs away from the wide marker too. He's missing his lines here
Goes short again, bounces away, wide of Rana. He reaches for it but gets no ball on bat once more
Shami bangs it in short again, 137.9 clicks this time. He angles it right at the batter too this time, so Rana crouches below it
Finally, a full ball. Big angle back into the batter off a good length, outside off. Rana defends it down the pitch

Rana gets hold of that one! Shami attempts a similar delivery, angling it into his hips from outside off. Rana uses the angle into him to flick this into the air, off his hips. Runs away to the deep square boundary
On a length outside off, more cramped lines, less swing into the batter. Rises at Rana's gloves as he defends this with some unease
On a length and swings away from the batter from an outside off line. A loose waft in the air, honestly, goes back to the keeper
Angled into his hips off a good length, Nissanka runs into his leg side and when he sees the ball is seaming into him, he flicks this towards backward square leg

Samad gets it on second try!Rana tries to glide this laaaateee. The ball was on a length, seaming away. Took the edge off his shot - still, what was he thinking trying to play it late with first slip right there? Samad goes for it, ball bounces in the air, then he pouches it safely
Full-ish, on his pads. Rizvi flicks this towards deep fine leg and takes an easy run. Gets an easier second one as a result of a sloppy misfield from Pant...
On a length, swinging away after landing on the stumps. Easy defense into the off side
Slightly fuller, kept right on the off stump line and the batter is rushed just a little as he defends this under his eyes
135.4 clicks, looks slower off the pitch. Kept on a length outside off, Nissanka goes cross-batted but can only find mid-wicket
Sprayed well outside off. Takes late swing, but umpire spreads his arms again

Straight up and Pant collects this one! Was on a length, just outside off. Nissanka never looked comfortable out there. Slogs this high in the air, behind him, and Pant dives in the end to complete the catch
Bangs it in short. Too wide. Called a wide. There's been a lot of wides. You get the idea

WHAT A BALL! Timbersssss.Prince Yadav bangs this in on a length, swings back into Axar. 138.3 kph, but felt more like 148.3 off the pitch. Axar tried to flick this and is in disbelief as he turns around and sees his stumps splattered. Whaddaball
Bouncer. Sprayed down leg side though. Wide. Kapiche?
Well-directed bouncer, but no venom to it. Stubbs stands still and just swats this away from sight. Ball rushes towards deep square leg
Full and outside off. Stubbs drives this into the covers...
Good ball - on a length, on the off-stump line, and Stubbs can only defend it down the pitch once more
On a length, defended again
Same delivery: outside off, on a length, and driven to the covers
Rizvi tries to play this late, but still can't get off the mark. Outside off, still getting vicious swing off it, and he glides this straight towards backward point
Awkward flash at the ball as he tries to swipe across the line from in front of his chest. Short-ish, but slows down, and thuds into him instead of producing any runs
On a length, right on the line of the stumps, Stubbs is happy to just defend once more
Shorter now, rising at Stubbs outside off. Stubbs flicks this towards deep fine leg and sets off for the other end

Rizvi's agony continues. He tries to change his fortunes by stepping down the pitch and swinging through the line. The ball is on a length on the stumps, and it just whizzes past him. Appeals around the pitch, umpire says not out. We have ourselves a review. Big gap between bat and ball, it seems. Rizvi's now seven balls without a run on the board...
And he's finally off the mark! On a length, right outside off, he plays it towards mid-off and runs over to the other end. Finally!
Well outside off. Stubbs plays this inside-out drive late, towards deep point
On a length and tailing into the batter. Flicks this from near his chest, towards square leg
French cut. On a good length, rising at him as he tries to drive it. Ball dribbles down to backward square leg, lying vacant, as they sneak in a run
Fuller now, outside off. An energetic cut gets it down to point. They do well to save the extra run, not so well to throw in a wayward ball. They sneak in a second run. Not good fielding, in the end
Another wide, how we'd missed those! Goes for another bouncer, but the batter jumps for it and still can't reach it
Too wide, back of a length. Stubbs easily threads this through to the deep cover region
Full and swinging back into the pads of Rizvi. An attempt at a flick never goes anywhere
Good ball, on a length and just outside off. Rizvi does well to glide this quite late, towards deep backward point
W-i-d-e. Wide. It was a wide. Drifts away from the batter looking to hook this short ball, down leg.
On a length again, outside off. Rizvi times the pants out of this drive, but extra cover runs to his right to intercept this
On a length outside off. It's drop and run once again, as Stubbs plays this into the pitch and sprint to the other end of the pitch
And that's why the extras hurt. Another short ball, outside off this time. Rizvi does really well to lean back and ramp this over deep third
Oh lord. Another bouncer attempted that drifts down leg. Wideeeeee.
On a length, on the stumps, Stubbs drives this towards mid-on and jogs to the other end
Another bouncer. Rizvi plays this almost like a tennis forehand, because the ball was drifting right down his head. Slapped with a bat perpendicular to the pitch, and straight down the ground
On a length and a grounded shot gets Stubbs to the other end
Full and on the stumps, driven down to mid-on once again
Almost gets the nick!Ball lands on a length, then straightens after pitching. Whizzes past a Stubbs defense, he knows he's lucky to survive that
A boundary after a while! Shami pitches this slightly fuller, outside off, and he drives this towards the covers. Stands tall and times this with elegance, he's done well to stay in the middle here
Slow through the air, lands on a length in front of the stumps. Rizvi flicks this towards deep mid-wicket
Great shot, this! Gets on one knee and hoicks this ball from its short-ish length and behind him, into the deep fine leg boundary
On a length. He drives this down through the mid-off area
On a length, right on the stumps, Stubbs drives this past a diving Axar Patel - who almost does a cartwheel - and towards long off
A long hop, really. Rizvi goes on the backfoot and just slashes this across the line. Runs towards the deep square leg area, which lies vacant
Poor over, smart batting! Now it floated down leg, and he just flicks it towards deep fine leg to collect another boundary
On off stump, the length ball is flicked to deep square leg
Pitched up outside off, punchy drive through cover. Deep point runs right to stop it
Length on off, defended while jumping back to cover
Shortish 145ks ball on off. Stubbs too jumps a bit while playing this. Gets his gloves away from the ball while defending towards cover point
Good short ball over middle and off, Rizvi squats down fully to let it pass. 148ks
Back of length on middle and leg, 147ks, flicked to midwicket
And it's a comfy single to deep third. Length ball around off, Rizvi opens the face fully and looks back as ball hit bat
Length on off, open-faced punch off the back foot with a vertical bat. Goes to backward point on the bounce

Comes back in and beats the inside edge. Seam up 138ks length ball lands around middle and finishes on middle and off. Stubbs doesn't move his feet and is almost dangling the bat as he tries to defend straight
Short on middle and off, pulled to deep midwicket
Wide, short too. Let go
A bit of room and it's cut hard, finds backward point. Rizvi'll feel he missed out
Back of length on leg, looked slow off the pitch and it was indeed a slower one. 118ks. Rizvi swivelled as the ball was released, went for the pull. Didn't middle it, gets it to square leg
Beats the edge. On a length, slightly wide, goes away and beats the attempted dab to third
Length on off, guided with an open-faced vertical bat to deep third
Length on off, flicked to long-on
Length on middle and leg, 136ks, looks to tuck it leg side. Gets a leading edge that goes into ground, to cover
Flashes it away, shot similar to the one that got Rahul. This goes wide of deep third, Mohsin dives to the right to save two. Full ball outside off, looking to drive over cover
Very low full toss at 136ks on middle and leg is flicked to long-on's right
Back of length on leg, flicked through midwicket
Markram bowling to the field but that's a touch too far down leg, shortish ball is pulled to the right of deep-backward square. Longish chase for the fielder
This'll all be at the body and a touch short, it seems like. Rizvi goes back and guides it to short fine leg

Rizvi meddles with Markram's line by sliding leg side, Markram misses his length too. Goes too full. Rizvi is perfectly placed for the step-hit. Drives it with a closed face, over wide long-on for a big six. We'll need a ball replacement
Compensation in line, Rizvi's ready and crunches a late cut to the left of backward point. Gets to fifty, raises his bat and gets applauded by the dugout
Length on off, defended to cover. Timeout taken
Back of length on middle, flicked to deep-backward square
Beaten. Went to ramp it over the keeper. Limboed to the leg side and got the bat up, the bouncer over him beat him for pace
Thats audacious, making room to Nortje before he delivers. Back of length ball over middle is cut hard to deep cover point
French cut goes to the fine-leg boundary. Back of length just outside off, seam-up and it decks back in, Stubbs is on the back foot looking to square-drive it, gets an under-edge
Back of length on off, flicked to midwicket
Back of length outside off, guided off the back foot to deep third
Length at the stumps, punched to long-on

Might be out, no. Too far back for mid-off. Badoni ran to his right but the and the ball fell well forward. Was a back of length ball just outside off that Rizvi looked to pull across. Got opened up fully
Pace off, short of length, helped to fine leg
Bouncer has been helped fine with a pull, close to deep fine leg - who is fine - but beats him. Rizvi's head was going down and he crouched a touch as he played the shot.
More ready for this. Slower one halfway down the pitch. At the stumps. Pulled flat over deep square leg. That's the game all but done. Hundred partnership up
Hard length on off, defended to the bowler's left
Length on off, punched off the back foot to cover
Hostile pace meets incredible strokeplay! No using the pace business. Stubbs stands tall and flat bats a 144ks back of length ball from just outside off. Clears long-on for an 81-metre six
Slower full ball on middle is defended softly to mid-on
Makes room again, Nortje goes for the full ball just outside off. Rizvi's too far away and looks to scythe it behind point, loses his balance a bit and gets beaten
Makes room, Nortje looks to follow him with a bumper but it's too short and beats the keeper too. Rizvi looked to ramp it over the keeper, needed no contact in the end
That deserved more than one. Crunched the cover drive with one foot in front of leg stump and the other well down leg. Full ball hit from around middle
Back of length just outside off, punched to cover
Final ball as it turns out. Long-hop just outside off is hauled over deep midwicket with a pull. Rizvi smiles and punches Stubbs' arms as they hug
